title: Add Validate completions
body:
In podman 0.12.0 we have invalid completions.  These should have been
caught during testing. This check will throw an error if the completions
do not successfully execute.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Tests are exploding. Doesn't seem to be a known flake.
